title: Bangalore Days
subTitle: Three cousins, Divya, Krishnan and Arjuna, share a close bond and decide to move to Bangalore to fulfil their childhood dreams. There, they face challenges that will change their lives forever.

title: Alexander the Great
subTitle: Prathapa Verma, in his will, has bequeathed all his property to his illegitimate son, Alexander. His legitimate son and other relatives struggle to get the power of attorney by killing Alexander.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Jawan of Vellimala
subTitle: The villagers of Vellimala force the government to build a dam in their village. However, when the dam becomes unsafe, the government decides to destroy it, leading to violent protests by the villagers.

title: Paappi Appachaa
subTitle: Paappi, a mischievous man, is in love with his childhood sweetheart, Annie. His relationship with his father turns sour after he thrashes Annie's prospective groom.

title: Teddy
subTitle: Srividya, a young woman, is put in a coma by corrupt doctors. However, her spirit enters a teddy bear and seeks out a lonely man named Shiva to uncover medical crimes.

title: Srungaravelan
subTitle: Kanan falls in love with Raddhu, the daughter of a ruthless city gangster responsible for numerous deaths. To marry her, Kanan must confront the dangers and challenges that lie ahead.

title: Pulimurugan
subTitle: A small village seeks help from a man with extraordinary force to protect them against man-eating tigers and the drug mafia.

title: Ronth
subTitle: A senior cop and a new recruit are forced to work together through a tense night shift, confronting danger and personal dilemmas that reveal deep cracks in the system.

title: Vellinakshathram
subTitle: Aswathy, who belongs to a royal family with dark secrets, falls in love with Vinod. However, strange events begin occurring after Aswathy mysteriously dies during childbirth.

title: Vellinakshathram
subTitle: Aswathy, who belongs to a royal family with dark secrets, falls in love with Vinod. However, strange events begin occurring after Aswathy mysteriously dies during childbirth.

title: Koottu
subTitle: Hari and Balu are best buddies who come from different backgrounds. Suddenly Balu is found missing and Hari takes the initiative to find him.

title: The Great Indian Kitchen
subTitle: A newly married woman tries to become an ideal wife and daughter-in-law to her traditional and patriarchy family. Eventually, their growing demands and disrespect cause rifts between them.

title: Chakram
subTitle: Chandrahasan, a truck driver, falls in love with Indrani and gets married to her. His life takes an unexpected turn when his best friend kidnaps Indrani and he sets out to rescue her.

title: Nasrani
subTitle: David and Sara's marriage fails due to an unexpected turn of events. Years later, they continue to love one another and also strive to prove Sara's sister's innocence in a murder case.

title: Minnal Murali
subTitle: Jaison, a young tailor, gains superpowers after being struck by lightning. However, he must thwart the evil intentions of an unexpected adversary to become the superhero that his rural village needs.

title: Android Kunjappan Version 5.25
subTitle: After Subramanian has to leave his aged father alone to go to Russia, he returns with a robot to take care of him. Even though hesitant at first, his father soon develops a strong bond with the robot.

title: Hridayam
subTitle: Arun, a young man, enrols in an engineering college but falls prey to bad habits. As he grows up, he decides to turn over a new leaf and become a responsible adult.

title: Naran
subTitle: Velayudhan, an orphan, is loved by the villagers as he keeps the village free from unsavoury people and practices. However, an evil moneylender and politician get jealous and try to get rid of him.

title: Love Action Drama
subTitle: Dinesh, a conceited and wealthy young bachelor, goes to extreme lengths to impress a girl named Shobha with the help of his best friend Sagar, and Dinesh eventually hopes to marry Shobha.

title: Love Action Drama
subTitle: Dinesh, a conceited and wealthy young bachelor, goes to extreme lengths to impress a girl named Shobha with the help of his best friend Sagar, and Dinesh eventually hopes to marry Shobha.

title: Udayon
subTitle: Kunju is so obsessed with his land that he even grabs his sister's share by forging his father's will. Though he is known to be stubborn, his love for agriculture is appreciated by his youngest son.

title: Irul
subTitle: Alex and Archana go on a trip but soon their car breaks down, and they take shelter at a nearby house. However, things take a turn when the owner of the house behaves in a suspicious manner.

title: Kudumbasree Travels
subTitle: Aravindan, a Chakyar Koothu artist from a village, gets married to Aswathy, who lives in a city. The whole village decides to accompany him to attend his marriage.

title: Female Unnikrishnan
subTitle: Unnikrishnan, a man with a feminine voice, gets made fun of among his neighbourhood. Things take an unusual turn when he marries a wealthy woman with speech impairment.

title: Neru
subTitle: Determined to seek justice, Sara Mohammed, a girl who is blind and a talented sculptor, joins hands with a disbarred lawyer as she goes up against her aggressor, the son of a business tycoon.

title: Bahubali-2
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Ormayundo Ee Mukham
subTitle: Gautham is a young and successful businessman. His life dramatically changes when he meets Nithya, a girl who is suffering from short-term memory loss.

title: Snehaveedu
subTitle: Ajayan comes back to his village to be with his ailing mother. However, things get strange when a boy comes to his house claiming to be his son.

title: Rappakal
subTitle: Saraswathiyamma is the head of a noble family that treats her servant Krishnan as one of her own sons. When her relatives conspire to sell her house, she and Krishnan set out to save it.
